title: galium scioanum var. latum
intro: Galium scioanum var. latum, also known as the Chinese gentian, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. Galium scioanum var. latum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, or dried and made into capsules or tablets.
